title: 高风险会诊显示已同步三端，但 fallback 结果只写入前端 store
userStory: 作为教师，我希望发起高风险会诊后，教师、家长和园长都能读取同一条真实会诊记录。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/teacher/high-risk-consultation/page.tsx 的 done 事件处理。
扫描 app/api/ai/high-risk-consultation/stream/route.ts 的本地 SSE fallback。
扫描 lib/store.tsx 的 upsertConsultation/upsertInterventionCard 写入路径。
expected: 会诊完成后应调用后端 consultation 持久化接口，三端从同一后端记录读取，并按 API 结果展示同步状态。
actual: SSE fallback 可以生成 renderable result；页面随后 setResult、upsertConsultation、upsertInterventionCard、markMobileDraftSyncStatus，并显示会诊完成已同步教师端、家长端和园长端，但没有 feature-specific 保存 API。

codeSignals: stream fallback uses setTimeout(push, 80) to simulate staged SSE output
providerTrace sets transport next-json-fallback / realProvider false / fallback true
done handler mutates React/local app store only
success copy says synced to teacher, parent and director sides

recommendedImplementation: Add consultation create/update/read APIs, persist the generated consultation and intervention card transactionally, and only show cross-role sync success after the write succeeds.
notes: This is the highest-risk fake success because it claims multi-role synchronization for a clinical/risk workflow.

title: 教师家园沟通回复只进入 React state，没有 send/reply API
userStory: 作为教师，我希望回复家长消息后，家长能收到并且刷新后仍可查看。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/teacher/agent/page.tsx 的 communication state。
扫描 sendCommunicationReply 函数。
确认发送路径没有 fetch、mutation 或持久化调用。
expected: 教师回复应调用 reply/send API，保存 message thread，并按 childId/classId/session 做权限校验。
actual: sendCommunicationReply 构造 sentItem 后只调用 setSentCommunicationItems、setProcessedCommunicationIds、setCommunicationDrafts 和 setCommunicationTab；页面按钮文案包含本地回复。

codeSignals: communicationDrafts, processedCommunicationIds and sentCommunicationItems are component state
sendCommunicationReply has no fetch/request/mutation call
sent item id is generated from childId plus Date.now
UI exposes local reply flow instead of persisted conversation

recommendedImplementation: Implement conversation/reply POST and list APIs, bind replies to real parent feedback/message records, and reload thread state from the backend.
notes: C13 browser audit already observed the same behavior; C20 records the code-level cause.

title: 家长结构化反馈提交用本地 store 和通用快照，不是家园沟通 API
userStory: 作为家长，我希望提交今晚反馈后，教师端能读取同一条真实反馈并继续回复。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/parent/agent/page.tsx 的 submitStructuredFeedback。
扫描 lib/store.tsx 的 addGuardianFeedback 和 persistAppSnapshotNow。
确认没有 guardian-feedback/message feature API。
expected: 反馈提交应调用专用 guardian feedback/message API，并能跨账号读取、回复和审计。
actual: submitStructuredFeedback 先 flushSync 写 addGuardianFeedback/checkInTask/reminder 状态，再调用 persistAppSnapshotNow；demo 用户只 local_only，普通用户也只保存整个 /api/state snapshot。

codeSignals: feedback save path mutates guardianFeedbacks in app store
demo account returns local_only instead of remote persistence
generic snapshot persistence is used in place of a feedback/thread API
status copy still says feedback submitted or recorded

recommendedImplementation: Create POST/GET guardian feedback APIs and connect teacher communication to those records instead of relying on scoped localStorage/snapshot state.
notes: Product should decide whether structured tonight feedback is also a communication message or a separate feedback object with linked replies.

title: 晨检记录保存只调用 upsertHealthCheck 本地状态
userStory: 作为教师，我希望晨检体温、情绪和异常状态保存到真实晨检台账。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/health/page.tsx 的 handleSaveHealthCheck。
扫描 lib/store.tsx 的 upsertHealthCheck。
确认保存按钮路径没有 health-check API。
expected: 晨检保存应调用健康记录写入接口，并返回保存失败、权限失败和冲突处理状态。
actual: handleSaveHealthCheck 校验后调用 upsertHealthCheck，并立即 toast 成功/警告；upsertHealthCheck 只 setHealthCheckRecords。

codeSignals: no fetch/request/mutation in save path
toast says record saved before any backend write
store write creates local client id with createClientId('hc')

recommendedImplementation: Add health-check POST/PUT APIs and make success toast conditional on backend success; keep optimistic UI only with rollback/error state.
notes: Counted as no-api/local-state-only record save. Backend gap is covered in shared persistence findings.

title: 饮食单餐和批量录入保存只写本地 mealRecords
userStory: 作为教师，我希望单餐、批量餐单和 AI 营养建议保存到真实饮食记录。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/diet/page.tsx 的 saveMealRecord、confirmApplyBulkTemplate 和 runDietEvaluation。
扫描 lib/store.tsx 的 upsertMealRecord/bulkApplyMealTemplate。
确认保存路径没有 meal record API。
expected: 餐食保存、批量应用和 AI 营养建议应写入后端饮食记录，并支持刷新、跨角色查看和错误处理。
actual: 单餐保存和批量应用调用 upsertMealRecord/bulkApplyMealTemplate；AI 营养建议调用 /api/ai/diet-evaluation 后仍通过 saveMealRecord 写本地记录。

codeSignals: AI endpoints analyze/generate only; record write remains local
bulkApplyMealTemplate loops local preview and calls upsertMealRecord
toast.success reports batch completion without a backend write

recommendedImplementation: Add meal record create/update/bulk APIs and persist AI evaluation metadata with the meal record.
notes: Vision and diet analysis APIs exist, but they do not make the meal save itself real.

title: 成长记录保存只调用 addGrowthRecord 本地状态
userStory: 作为教师，我希望成长观察记录保存到真实台账并同步给家长端。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/growth/page.tsx 的 submitRecord。
扫描 lib/store.tsx 的 addGrowthRecord。
确认没有 growth record POST/PUT。
expected: 成长记录应通过后端 API 保存，并绑定 childId、recorder、media、复查状态和权限范围。
actual: submitRecord 调用 addGrowthRecord 后 toast 成长记录已保存；addGrowthRecord 只 setGrowthRecords 并生成本地 id。

codeSignals: no fetch/request/mutation in submitRecord
record id comes from createClientId('g')
success toast is not tied to backend acknowledgement

recommendedImplementation: Add growth-record POST/GET APIs and use server response as the source of truth for new records.
notes: Media upload is not part of this save path.

title: 幼儿档案新增/删除走本地 store，编辑入口暂未开放
userStory: 作为园长，我希望新增、删除和编辑幼儿档案都保存到真实档案系统。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/children/page.tsx 的 handleSubmit 和删除按钮。
扫描 lib/store.tsx 的 addChild/removeChild。
确认编辑按钮 disabled 且无 children API。
expected: 幼儿档案新增、删除和编辑应调用后端 children API，并带机构、班级、家长绑定校验。
actual: handleSubmit 调用 addChild 后 toast 幼儿档案已保存；removeChild 级联删除本地数组；详情编辑按钮 disabled 并显示暂未开放。

codeSignals: addChild appends to childrenList with local generated id
removeChild deletes related local records in memory
edit profile button is disabled with 暂未开放

recommendedImplementation: Add children create/update/delete APIs with institution scoping and replace local cascade deletion with server-confirmed operations.
notes: This is counted as fake success because the UI says saved while no feature-specific write API is called.

title: 健康材料解析发送文件元数据和预览文字，fallback 标记为 mock
userStory: 作为教师，我希望上传图片或 PDF 后，系统解析真实文件内容并归档到健康档案。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/teacher/health-file-bridge/page.tsx 的 file 处理和 handleSubmit。
扫描 app/api/ai/health-file-bridge/route.ts 的 fallback 构造。
确认结果页没有真实归档提交动作。
expected: 健康材料应上传真实二进制或对象存储 fileId，解析结果经人工确认后保存到健康档案。
actual: 前端把 File 转为 name/mimeType/sizeBytes/previewText 元数据；API 在 brain 不可用时返回 source next-local-extractor、fallback true、mock true、liveReadyButNotVerified true；页面只 setResult。

codeSignals: file payload contains metadata and optional previewText, not binary file bytes
fallback response explicitly sets fallback true and mock true
persistHealthFileBridgeWriteback skips when brain base URL is missing
parsed result is held in component state

recommendedImplementation: Add real upload, parse job, confirm/archive APIs and store parsed evidence with source file references.
notes: This overlaps C14 behaviorally; this finding captures the code-level mock/fallback signals.

title: 教师语音/OCR 草稿入口使用 buildMock 和 placeholder provider
userStory: 作为教师，我希望语音速记和 OCR 草稿来自真实 ASR/OCR 解析，并能可靠同步。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/teacher/agent/page.tsx 的 createVoiceDraft/createOcrDraft。
扫描 lib/mobile/voice-input.ts 和 lib/mobile/ocr-input.ts。
扫描 ASR/OCR/TTS provider resolver。
expected: 语音/OCR 草稿应通过真实上传、ASR/OCR/understanding API 生成，并区分本地草稿和已同步记录。
actual: 教师页快捷入口直接调用 buildMockVoiceDraft/buildMockOcrDraft；OCR/TTS 的 real provider 仍返回 mock text/script；Vivo ASR 有凭据时也是 stub/mock path。

codeSignals: buildMockVoiceDraft creates local voice content
buildMockOcrDraft creates local OCR text and fields
RealPlaceholderOcrProvider and RealPlaceholderTtsProvider return fallback text/script
VivoAsrStubProvider mode remains mock

recommendedImplementation: Replace quick mock draft creation with real upload/understanding flows, or label these buttons as demo seed actions until real providers are wired.
notes: The API routes can return 200, but provider outputs are explicitly mock/stub in the scanned code paths.

title: 家长趋势查询在 brain 不可用时直接 503，缺少本地或后端实现
userStory: 作为家长，我希望查看孩子近期趋势时能得到稳定的趋势图和解释。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/parent/agent/page.tsx 的 submitTrendQuery。
扫描 app/api/ai/parent-trend-query/route.ts。
确认 fallback 不生成趋势结果。
expected: 趋势查询应有可用后端或本地规则 fallback，并返回结构化趋势结果、空态或错误态。
actual: 前端调用 /api/ai/parent-trend-query；当 brain proxy 没有 response 时，route 返回 503 和趋势解读暂时不可用，不生成趋势数据。

codeSignals: route forwards to brain endpoint and returns 503 on unavailable fallback
error detail says no available trend result
chart copy says backend trend service is not connected

recommendedImplementation: Implement a deterministic trend-query backend/fallback using existing health, diet, growth and feedback records, then reserve 503 for true outages.
notes: Backend-missing risk is explicit and user-visible.

title: 成长绘本 demoSeed 请求被隔离成本地 fallback 故事
userStory: 作为家长，我希望成长绘本生成来自真实孩子记录和真实媒体生成/缓存。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/api/ai/parent-storybook/route.ts 的 demoSeed 分支。
扫描 parent storybook cache/fallback metadata。
确认 demoSeed 不走远端生成。
expected: 非调试路径应请求真实 storybook generation，并清晰标注 fallback/demo media。
actual: requestSource 以 parent-storybook-demo-seed 开头时直接返回 fallbackReason demo-seed-isolated；brain 不可用或返回异常时也 buildLocalStoryBookFallback 并以 200 返回。

codeSignals: isDemoSeedRequest bypasses remote generation
response header x-smartchildcare-storybook-demo-seed is set to isolated
fallback story marks transport next-json-fallback
viewer supports demoSeed-driven generation path

recommendedImplementation: Keep demoSeed only for tests/storybook demos; production parent route should not auto-bypass remote generation without a visible fallback label.
notes: The route has real proxy capability, but the demoSeed path is explicitly mock/fallback.

title: 园长高风险会诊 feed 在后端空/不可用时返回 demo consultation feed
userStory: 作为园长，我希望看到教师真实发起并升级的会诊 feed，而不是演示补位数据。
reproSteps: 扫描 app/api/ai/high-risk-consultation/feed/route.ts。
扫描 lib/agent/use-admin-consultation-workspace.ts 的 fallback badge。
确认 fallback feed 由 demo-consultations 构造。
expected: 园长会诊 feed 应读取后端会诊表；后端为空时显示真实空态，不应静默用演示数据伪装。
actual: route 在 brain response 空 items 或 unavailable 时返回 buildDemoConsultationFeedItems；workspace badge 会显示演示兜底/本地兜底。

codeSignals: imports buildDemoConsultationFeedItems
empty backend feed returns fallback true with demo items
unavailable backend feed returns fallback true with demo items
badge labels include 演示兜底 and 本地兜底

recommendedImplementation: Return real empty/unavailable states separately from demo data; only inject demo feed in explicitly demo routes or seeded test mode.
notes: This can mask missing backend consultation persistence.

title: 园长 pixel replica 看板包含静态图表与档案行，属于 visual/mock metrics
userStory: 作为园长，我希望看板指标、班级分布和档案行来自真实机构数据。
reproSteps: 扫描 components/admin/pixel-replica/directorReplicaData.ts。
扫描 app/admin/page.tsx 和 app/admin/agent/page.tsx 对 replica 组件的使用。
确认存在硬编码 chart/data rows。
expected: 看板视觉复刻可以保留，但业务指标应使用 view model 或后端数据，静态示例应清晰标记。
actual: directorReplicaData 导出固定 assets、trendTabs、chartLabels、weeklyTrendSeries、classDistribution、childArchiveRows、weeklyPendingRows 等静态数据。

codeSignals: pixel replica assets are fixed public images
chart labels and trend series are hard-coded
child archive rows use names such as 乐乐 and 小米 independent of visibleChildren
replica components mix real view model props with static decorative/mock data

recommendedImplementation: Move static replica values behind clearly labeled demo-only fixtures or replace them with computed values from admin view models.
notes: Counted as both visual-only and mock-only dashboard metrics.

title: 周报预览有生成 API，但没有保存/归档周报接口
demoAccount: 李老师 | 陈园长 | 林妈妈
userStory: 作为教师或园长，我希望生成周报后能保存为历史周报并分享/回看。
reproSteps: 扫描 lib/agent/weekly-report-client.ts。
扫描 app/api/ai/weekly-report/route.ts。
扫描 admin/teacher pages对 weeklyReport 的状态缓存。
expected: 周报生成后应支持 save/list/detail/share API，至少明确这是临时预览。
actual: fetchWeeklyReport 只 POST /api/ai/weekly-report 并校验返回结构；页面使用 Map/useState 缓存预览结果，没有 weekly report save/list endpoint。

codeSignals: weekly report client has fetch/generate only
admin page caches report in weeklyReportCacheRef Map
no save/report archive route found in scanned code
source meta supports fallback/mock but not persistence

recommendedImplementation: Define whether weekly reports are artifacts; if yes, add save/list/detail APIs and UI states for unsaved/generated/saved.
notes: Generation can be real or fallback; persistence is the missing backend capability.

title: 家长反馈附件/语音图片补充是 disabled 占位入口
userStory: 作为家长，我希望反馈时能上传语音、图片或视频补充，让老师看到原始上下文。
reproSteps: 扫描 components/parent/ParentStructuredFeedbackComposer.tsx。
确认附件按钮 disabled。
确认提交 payload 的 attachments 为空对象。
expected: 附件入口应有 upload API、进度/失败状态和已上传文件引用；未开放时应避免呈现为可用功能。
actual: 桌面视觉块显示上传照片/视频但按钮 disabled；另一分支说明语音和图片后续任务接入，本轮只保留占位入口不上传文件；handleSubmit 固定 attachments: {}。

codeSignals: attachments are submitted as empty object
photo/video add button is disabled
copy says voice and image supplements will be connected later
disabled buttons say 语音补充 稍后开放 and 图片补充 稍后开放

recommendedImplementation: Either hide/label attachment upload as not launched, or add parent feedback attachment upload APIs and persist attachment refs with feedback.
notes: This is visual-only because the UI surface exists but business behavior is intentionally disabled.
